response.justification: While Bogdan demonstrates strong general software engineering fundamentals, production-scale systems experience, and solid technical leadership, he lacks the core specialized expertise required for this Principal role: no demonstrated experience with experimentation platforms, A/B testing infrastructure, metrics/telemetry systems, or data science collaboration. These are not peripheral skills but the central technical domain of the position. At Principal level, the expectation is domain expertise and immediate impact; this candidate would require significant ramp-up in growth and experimentation systems.
strengths: 20 years of production software engineering with proven experience scaling systems to millions of RPS at Dunnhumby and designing infrastructure across multiple companies
Strong software craftsmanship practices including TDD, CI/CD, and testing-focused development demonstrated across roles, aligning with the quality and reliability emphasis of the role
Technical leadership and mentoring ability evidenced by staff/senior promotions, open-source contributions, and workshops teaching software engineering principles
concerns: No demonstrated experience with experimentation platforms, A/B testing frameworks, feature flagging systems, or rollout-risk management—the core technical domain of this role
Zero evidence of metrics infrastructure, telemetry systems, statistical analysis, or collaboration with data science teams despite these being essential for growth/experimentation systems
Limited track record of cross-product, multi-team systemic solutions; most roles focused on single products or infrastructure components rather than enterprise-scale growth systems spanning teams

key_factors.factor: No metrics/telemetry or data science collaboration experience
Strong production engineering fundamentals and scale experience
